hero_subtitle: SFTY structures wallet and transaction risk alerts into a unified triage workflow that helps compliance teams focus on critical cases while preserving audit-ready evidence.
trust_card_1_value: Identity checks connected to onboarding decisions
trust_card_2_value: Corporate verification, UBO review and entity risk
trust_card_3_value: Wallet and transaction monitoring in one workflow
trust_card_4_value: Message routing, completeness checks and exception handling
trust_card_5_value: Regulatory changes mapped to internal rule
trust_card_6_value: Decision logs and evidence for every review
problem_title: Alert triage depends on manual review
problem_description: Compliance teams at VASPs face high volumes of KYT and transaction alerts that require time-consuming manual triage. This slows decision-making and fragments risk context across multiple tools and provider outputs, increasing operational burden.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY aggregates KYT alerts, transaction data and wallet risk signals into one unified case management workflow so compliance teams can prioritize reviews with complete risk context and audit evidence.
workflow_title: Alerts move into prioritized case review
workflow_description: SFTY channels KYT alerts through prioritization, manual review, case creation and decision logging to reduce workload and improve compliance control.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_title: Beyond alert overload. Structured triage control
why_sfty_description: SFTY turns scattered alerts into prioritized cases with evidence and decisions, giving compliance teams clear workflows and audit-ready control above fragmented KYT tools.
why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view
authority_description: SFTY supports VASP compliance teams with structured alert triage, audit-ready evidence and governance to reduce manual workload and strengthen bank due diligence workflows.
authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow
authority_card_2_description: Preserve provider outputs, reviewer notes, decisions and supporting records
authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review
authority_card_4_description: Support private environments, permissions, integrations and internal governance
ask_sfty_placeholder: How can SFTY support prioritized alert triage workflows
ask_sfty_chip_1_message: Explain how alerts are routed and prioritized for review
ask_sfty_chip_2_message: Show how audit evidence is preserved during alert triage
ask_sfty_chip_3_message: Explain how provider outputs integrate to reduce alert volume
ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for VASP compliance teams?
faq_1_answer: SFTY provides a connected compliance layer for VASPs, connecting KYT alerts, wallet risk, transactions and cases into structured workflows to reduce manual workload and improve oversight.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY prioritize KYT alerts?
faq_2_answer: SFTY aggregates KYT provider outputs and applies internal risk rules and AI-assisted review to prioritize alerts for efficient compliance triage and case creation.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve audit-ready evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY records decision logs, preserves case history and collects linked evidence packages to support audit readiness and defensible compliance reviews.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with existing compliance stacks?
faq_4_answer: Yes. SFTY works above existing KYC, KYT, Travel Rule and screening tools, connecting their outputs through APIs into one governed compliance workflow system.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace KYT or screening providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY does not replace underlying KYT or screening providers but connects their alerts and data into structured, auditable workflows and reporting workflows.
final_title: Bring KYT alerts into structured review workflows
final_description: Review how SFTY supports alert prioritization by connecting wallet risk, transaction monitoring and sanctions exposure into audit-ready cases.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.
